sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after 5 upper blue clicks. The bottom section was at white = 12, and I clicked 5 times (each shifts left by 4), so the bottom section should be at white = 12 - 20 = -8, but it can't go below 0. So the bottom section should be at white = 0 after 3 clicks, and the remaining 2 clicks might shift something else.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
ascii_lines_before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
ascii_lines_after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in [1, 16, 24, 36, 40, 52, 54]:
    line_b = ascii_lines_before[i]
    line_a = ascii_lines_after[i]
    def compress(line):
        compressed = ''
        prev = ''
        count = 0
        for ch in line:
            if ch == prev:
                count += 1
            else:
                if count > 1:
                    compressed += f"{prev}x{count}"
                elif count == 1:
                    compressed += prev
                prev = ch
                count = 1
        if count > 1:
            compressed += f"{prev}x{count}"
        elif count == 1:
            compressed += prev
        return compressed
    cb = compress(line_b)
    ca = compress(line_a)
    changed = "CHANGED" if cb != ca else ""
    print(f"  {i:2d}: {cb} → {ca} {changed}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
